diagrams.title: OPERATING SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE LAYERS
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchical layers from hardware to user applications
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS provides abstraction and services to users through multiple layers of software

diagrams.title: SYSTEM CALL FLOW DIAGRAM
diagrams.description: Shows how user programs interact with OS kernel through system calls
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the path of control when a program requests OS services

diagrams.title: BOOTSTRAP PROCESS SEQUENCE
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process from power on to OS loading
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how computer starts up and loads operating system

diagrams.title: OS COMPONENTS AND INTERACTIONS
diagrams.description: Shows major OS components and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding modular design and functions of operating system components
